title: NOAA releases Aquaculture Atlas for Gulf of Alaska
summary: A new Aquaculture Atlas for the Gulf of Alaska says the state’s aquaculture sector may be uniquely positioned to adapt to future climate scenarios, but that risks remain. Shifts in water quality, disease outbreaks and intensified harmful algal bloom levels could threaten production and public health, the NOAA report said. Additionally, expanding and shifting ranges of non-native or invasive species can affect ecosystem health and aquaculture viability in the future, according to the rep...

title: Supplemental budget bill stalls as Alaska House mulls war-fueled oil price forecast
summary: House Republicans strategize ahead of a vote on Thursday, March 12, 2026. (Eric Stone | Alaska Public Media) The fate of a closely watched budget bill in the Alaska Legislature is back up in the air after House Republicans declined to back a supermajority vote on Thursday that would have funded the bill from savings. Republicans argued higher-than-expected oil prices — due largely to the war in Iran — would negate the need for a savings draw. And that’s true, if new state revenue projections released Frid...
